title: Pharmacy Technician
description: Genentech is seeking a Pharmacy Technician to support our clinical and pharmaceutical operations in Portland. You'll manage medications, maintain pharmacy records, and ensure compliance with pharmacy regulations. This onsite role offers exposure to cutting-edge pharmaceutical development and a collaborative healthcare environment.
responsibilities: Receive, store, and manage pharmaceutical inventory; ensure proper handling and rotation of stock
Prepare medication doses under pharmacist supervision; verify accuracy and completeness
Maintain pharmacy records and documentation; ensure HIPAA and DEA compliance
Support clinical trials and research programs; coordinate medication distribution for studies
Assist patients and healthcare providers; communicate clearly about medications and procedures

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; completion of pharmacy technician program

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and hearing coverage
